mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns exceed 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing equity investors to price in lower future earnings and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses the threshold during late-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth combined with stable consumer price indices indicates robust consumer demand without inflationary pressure, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative returns in >50% of cases or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, triggering immediate positive earnings revisions and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with INDPRO momentum during recovery phases with p-value exceeding 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels exceeding 205 signal entrenched inflationary pressures that force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, increasing equity risk premiums and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Returns remain positive in >55% of periods where CPIAUCSL exceeds the threshold, or Rank IC drops below 0.01 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands household income and consumer spending capacity, directly boosting corporate earnings forecasts and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling 5-year windows or positive return frequency drops below 45% across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts coinciding with expanding gross domestic product indicate synchronized strength in residential investment and aggregate demand, driving positive equity market momentum over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive returns in >60% of triggered instances during early-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month decline in industrial production signals an abrupt supply chain disruption or demand shock, triggering immediate risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >50% of instances following the threshold breach, or the signal shows zero predictive power in walk-forward tests.
